snippet.description:
Hurricane will represent Serbia at the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 with the song LOCO LOCO.
-
Composer: Nemanja Antonińá
Lyrics: Sanja Vuńćińá
Arrangement: Nemanja Antonińá, Darko Dimitrov
-
Lyrics:
Nemoj da se ljutiŇ°, hrabrost skupi
Jedna cura kao ja ne traŇĺi obeńáanja
Ne skidaŇ° taj pogled ti sa mene
Lako uŇ°la sam ja u tvoje vene

Osmeh tvoj mi kaŇĺe
Da me ŇĺeliŇ° koga laŇĺeŇ°
Slatka kao ńáoko moko
Hajde budi loco

Ram ba-ba-bam
A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biŇĺe lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco

Baby, baby, baby, ńćemu drama
Jedna cura kao ja ne traŇĺi obeńáanja
Baby, baby, baby, igram sama
To Ň°to nisi sa mnom to je tvoja mana

Osmeh tvoj mi kaŇĺe
Da me ŇĺeliŇ° koga laŇĺeŇ°

I ja znam znam znam

A ti si sam sam sam

snippet.title: Cenińá: Baja ostavio Ňĺenu i dijete gladne, a on kiti muziku
snippet.description:
Bile su izjave kako se neńáe potpisati nabavka vakcina bez izmjene Izbornog zakona. Kakve veze ima zakon sa nabavkom. Oni su se vakcinisali, Ň°ta ih briga za ostali narod. Dodik je nabavkom vakcina gurnuo ikonu postrani, izgleda da u FBiH nisu imali Ň°ta gurnuti postrani, kazala je u Pressingu ekspertica za ekonomiju i grańĎanska aktivistica Svetlana Cenińá.

Follow us:

Tekst :

Verse 1 (Jostra)

U gradu je kriminal, lova je u firmama
Bebe nose minival - brańáa nose kilogram
Kola ot Bulgaria - Ňĺivim sa gorilama
Roba prva ruka, letim Kosovo-Bolivija

Dok piŇ°amo uz vetar (uu uU)
Pijemo uz JuŇĺni vetar (uu uu)
Vodim igru kao Petar MaraŇ° (uu uu)
Nisi brŇĺi nego metak, kalaŇ° (uu uu) 

Ratata, 24 karata
Oko vrata i za brata oko ruke zlatan sat
Na ulici - ljubi brat, ovo ti je juŇĺni gas
Ovo nije Ň†vajcarska, Balkan bure baruta

Hook:

Uspeh i mońá
Nocas ne ńćekaj me ja ti neńáu dońá
Uspeh i mońá 
Sve Ň°to dońĎe mi za dan to ode mi za nońá
Uspeh i mońá
I samo pare leńće ovu bol
juŇĺni vetar - alkohol, droga, suze krv i znoj

Verse 2 (Eldorado)

Jajare misle da menjaju svet
samo na rafalno hekler je 5
prenecu kofer i dobijaŇ° ket
sad sam na granici zovem za pet
naŇ°a gerila je spremna do zuba
cistimo teren ko da smo UDBA
metkovi kamate kurve i gudra
brza frizura i devetka duga
nece ni Bog viŇ°e da sudi
pravo kroz staklo metak u grudi
nocu se Ň°ibamo danju smo budni
sanduci borbene opreme puni
cetiri je strane sveta
veliki izbor nema Ň°ta
ja kod mene dva paketa
Nek mi sudi 92


Hook:

Uspeh i moc 
Nocas ne cekaj me ja ti necu doc
Uspeh i moc 
Sve Ň°to dodje mi za dan to ode mi za noc
Uspeh i moc 
I samo pare lece ovu bol
juŇĺni vetar - alkohol, droga, suze krv i znoj

snippet.title: Putin odgovorio Bajdenu: Amerika ńáe morati na ovo da rańćuna
snippet.description:
Predsednik Rusije Vladimir Putin je, reagujucŐĀi na izjavu amerińćkog predsednika DŇĺoa Bajdena, amerińćkom lideru poŇĺeleo zdravlje. ‚ÄěŇ†to se tińće izjave mog amerińćkog kolege, mi se zaista, kako je rekao, znamo lińćno. Ň†ta bih mu odgovorio? Rekao bih mu: Neka ste Ňĺivi i zdravi! ŇĹelim mu dobro zdravlje‚Äú, rekao je Putin.

Prethodno je Bajden u intervjuu za ‚ÄěEj-Bi-Si njuz‚Äú rekao da svog ruskog kolegu smatra ‚Äěubicom‚Äú. Bajden je tokom intervjua istakao da ‚Äěpoznaje‚Äú Vladimira Putina i da ruski predsednik ‚Äěpoznaje‚Äú njega. Na pitanje novinara da razjasni da li Bajden smatra Putina ubicom, amerińćki predsednik je odgovorio: ‚ÄěMhm, smatram‚Äú.

snippet.title: MEDICO - Mamma Mia (prod. by EnelBeatz)
snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM PROFILI:
Medico : https://www.instagram.com/whoismedico/

Music: Medico
Text: Medico
Arrangement: EnelBeatz, Arpino Sachi
Back vocal: MaŇ°a Sitarica
Mix & Master: Arpino Sachi


Video production: Vedad Mandra | xvedmanx
Directed by: Medico, Vedad Mandra
Script: Vedad Mandra, Medico
Camera: Vedad Mandra
CC VFX Post: Vedad Mandra
Costume: Emina Tsili

TEXT

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrti se sve dharma 
mama mia

ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x2


vers1
moje sve htjele bi bit
 jer na meni samo je lagerfeld karl e 
zelja joj htjela benz
 nije ni bitno ko sjedi sa strane

moli da voli brzo da boli
moli za gole sate
prolij pa dolij 
glumi mi dolly dobro ta zna sta radi

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugi il treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal

takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrati se sve dharma 
mama mia

 ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x3


vers 2.
da li mislis na mene ko prije
prisjetis se probije ko noz
navijas ti za mene i lijek
tvoj sam jedini ja antidot

znas ti moje namjere ne nisu namjerne
ali vuce me na zlo
velike su razmjere izmedju zavjere
razlika je nebo tlo

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugil treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal
takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

Ide prińća da u oku mom ńĎavo stanuje
Nońá je gore
Jutra hladna k‚Äôo led

Da se svima
Pakao samo raduje
Jer tu ljubav ne stiŇĺe na red

A ti znaŇ°, zar ne?!
Nisam kriva ja
Posle tebe bol me je
LoŇ°e skrojila

Nema sad Ň°anse da opet volim
Pancir sa ovog srca da sklonim
Jer joŇ° uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije
Jer joŇ° uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije

Pored mene
Samo ranjene duŇ°e padaju
K‚Äôo da sada
Samo radim na zlo
BaŇ° od one,
One Ň°to za ljubav bi dala sve
Jedan posto
Nije ostalo

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa‚Äč #FutureNostalgia‚Äč #Grammys

snippet.title: Armin Muzaferija i Sarajevska filharmonija // Studen vodo - Official Video
snippet.description:
‚úĒ Social Media: https://emdc.yt/arminmuzaferija

‚úĒ Stream & download: https://hayat-production.lnk.to/studen-vodo

Armin Muzaferija i Sarajevska filharmonija 
Studen vodo - Official video 2021

U sabah tiho,
ko' pletilja mlada,
svoje platno veze
na izvoru moga sna.

Pod njom kaplju zvijezde
u Ňĺilama nońái,
okińáena svilom
blagoslov mi nosi.

Hej Bosno studen vodo
da li tuŇĺiŇ° u samońái?
Vodi me njenoj gori
pa da i ja sklopim ońći.
Ja planine nemam 
da svoje snove svijem,
duŇ°a kad zaboli,
da se u njih krijem.
Povrh bistre vode
nońáima ja snivam
njeno lice bijelo
u vjeńćno se sliva.

Muzika: 
Alen LemeŇ°evińá
Tekst: 
Milena Ludajińá i Alen LemeŇ°evińá 
AranŇĺman: 
MiŇ°o Krpo, Joca Savińá ,Alen LemeŇ°evińá, Adnan MuŇ°anovińá

Dirigent:

Armin Muzaferija i Sarajevska filharmonija 
Studen vodo - Official video 2021

U sabah tiho,
ko' pletilja mlada,
svoje platno veze
na izvoru moga sna.

Pod njom kaplju zvijezde
u Ňĺilama nońái,
okińáena svilom
blagoslov mi nosi.

Hej Bosno studen vodo
da li tuŇĺiŇ° u samońái?
Vodi me njenoj gori
pa da i ja sklopim ońći.
Ja planine nemam 
da svoje snove svijem,
duŇ°a kad zaboli,
da se u njih krijem.
Povrh bistre vode
nońáima ja snivam
njeno lice bijelo
u vjeńćno se sliva.

#poslerucka #happytv
DANAS U EMISIJI "POSLE RUńĆKA" ISTRAŇĹUJEMO: Ako nema krańĎe beba, kako osobe proglaŇ°ene mrtvima na rońĎenju roditelji ponekad pronańĎu tokom Ňĺivota pod drugim imenima na drugim lokacijama? Kako spreńćiti krańĎe beba? Kakva kazna je najprikladnija za ljude koji se bave krańĎom dece?

Radmila MiljuŇ° - ŇĹena koja sumnja da joj je ukradena beba

snippet.title: INTERVJU: Vojislav Ň†eŇ°elj - Arkan i GiŇ°ka su bili strah i trepet, ja sam bio opasniji! (14.3.2021)
snippet.description:
Gost emisije "Intervju" bio je prof. dr Vojislav Ň†eŇ°elj, predsednik Srpske radikalne stranke. Kao najmlańĎi doktor nauka u SFRJ skrenuo je paŇĺnju na sebe nastupima u kojima je kritikovao komunistińćki reŇĺim zbog ńćega i osuńĎen na zatvorsku kaznu. Nakon izlaska iz zatvora nastavlja i pojańćava disidentsku retoriku i poziva Srbe da se vrate sebi i odbace titoizam. DrŇĺao je predavanja u SAD, gde je govorio srpskoj emigraciji. Momńćilo ńźujińá ga je proglasio ńćetnińćkim vojvodom. Pozivao je izmeŇ°tanje Brozovog groba iz Beograda. Pońćetkom raspada Jugoslavije pozivao je Srbe na borbu i stvaranje Velike Srbije. Slao je dobrovoljce na front i obilazio poloŇĺaje srpskih snaga. U Srbiji je bio opozicija reŇĺimu Slobodana MiloŇ°evińáa, ali kako je sam govorio, uvek konstruktivna. U toku politińćkog delovanja upoznao je i dosta ljudi s one strane zakona, a s nekima poput Arkana i GiŇ°ke ulazio je u otvoreni sukob, na ivici fizińćkog. Komentarisao je kriminalne obrańćune devedesetih, ńćesto iznoseńái u javnost ekskluzivne informacije o sluńćajevima, navodeńái da ih dobija od "Laufera". Tokom agresije 1999. godine bio je potpredsednik Vlade, ali i veliki protivnik Kumanovskog sporazuma, apelujuńái da je trebalo istrajati duŇĺe u otporu agresoru. Nakon petoktobarskih promena o kojima govori da su bili istorijska greŇ°ka srpskog naroda bio je opozicija reŇĺimu i veliki kritizer vlade Zorana ńźinńĎińáa. Sam je priznao da je imao kontakt i sa vońĎama Zemunskog klana. Nakon objavljivanja optuŇĺnice HaŇ°kog tribunala protiv njega odluńćio je da tamo i ode najavljujuńái krvavo proleńáe u Srbiji. Ubrzo nakon toga je likvidiran premijer ńźinńĎińá. U toku njegovog procesa u Hagu njegova stranka se podelila i deo ńćlanstva na ńćelu s Tomislavom Nikolińáem i Aleksandrom Vuńćińáem osnovao je Srpsku naprednu stranku. Iz HaŇ°kog tribunala je kako kaŇĺe izbańćen, jer nisu znali Ň°ta viŇ°e da rade sa njim. Napisao je veńái broj knjiga, od "Ideologije srpskog nacionalizma" do mnogih knjiga beskompromisnih naslova kojima kritikuje konkretne lińćnosti. Iz politińćke biografije izdvaja se i sledeńáe: ńćetiri puta je bio kandidat za predsednika Republike Srbije. Obavljao je duŇĺnost potpredsednika Vlade Republike Srbije, a u periodu od 1996. do 1998. bio je predsednik opŇ°tine Zemun. Preporuńćujemo da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate viŇ°e o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Intervju je snimljen 05.03.2021. godine u prostorijama Srpske radikalne stranke, u Zemunu. Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar Pavkovińá.

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i Ňĺele da pomognu rad naŇ°e produkcije to mogu uńćiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. Trudińáemo se da ostanemo dosledni naŇ°oj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i Ň°irenju istine bez cenzure.

snippet.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
snippet.description:
Music‚Äôs Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee Jhen√© Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, s√§je, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); s√§je for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Sa tobom sve je rulet, od milke do nule,
Brze nego Tesla S, ej
Tako ti je sa princezama, voli kad je vezana,
Pssst, Samo niko da ne cuje.

Ele ele ele ele
Ko bi reko da je mala ziva vatra.
Ele ele
Njene misli koje skriva nocu gresnije od pakla.

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Mala moze casove da daje,
Kada igra opasna je,
I svi kazu aj jaj jaj jaj,

Nocas lepa je ko Raj,
Kukovima uvija,
I svi kazu samo aj jaj jaj

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and Harry‚Äôs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines won‚Äôt be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs

https://www.youtube.com/user/CBCTheNational?sub_confirmation=1

Twitter | https://twitter.com/CBCTheNational
Instagram | https://www.instagram.com/cbcthenational

More from CBC News | https://www.cbc.ca/news

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

La Pasqua si avvicina, quindi ecco il primo video di quest'anno per dipingere le uova. Dipingi le uova nel modo originale senza l'uso di prodotti chimici, abbastanza naturalmente. Affinch√© l'uovo abbia questo effetto, √® meglio usare il bianco, quindi all'inizio del video puoi vedere come sbiancare un normale uovo giallo.

INGREDIENTI PER SBIANCARE L'UOVO
500 ml di acqua
400 ml di aceto alcolico

INGREDIENTI PER VERNICIARE LE UOVA
80 g di t√® all'ibisco
1 cucchiaino di aceto (alcolico o vino)
acqua bollita
+ un filo d'olio per ricoprire

Damit das Ei diesen Effekt erzielt, ist es am besten, Wei√ü zu verwenden. Am Anfang des Videos k√∂nnen Sie sehen, wie ein gew√∂hnliches gelbes Ei wei√ü wird.

snippet.title: Panathinaikos OPAP Athens - Crvena Zvezda mts Belgrade Highlights | EuroLeague, RS Round 30
snippet.description:
Crvena Zvezda MTS Belgrade took a hard-fought victory from OAKA after beating Panathinaikos OPAP Athens 82-86 on Friday night. 



ABOUT EUROLEAGUE BASKETBALL 
Euroleague Basketball (EB) is a global leader in the sports and entertainment business, devoted to running the top European competitions of professional basketball clubs under a unique and innovative organizational model. Owned and administered by some of the most successful and historic clubs in the world, EB manages and organizes the continent‚Äôs two premier men‚Äôs basketball competitions, the Turkish Airlines EuroLeague and the 7DAYS EuroCup, as well as the sport‚Äôs premier under-18 showcase, the EB Adidas Next Generation Tournament. 
The EB competitions bring the elite of European basketball to all five continents and to the entire sports community through the OTT platform EuroLeague TV. EB also organizes a series of community and educational programs. Its ground-breaking corporate social responsibility program One Team features all EB clubs that have already made a difference in the lives of over 22,000 participants. Its Sports Business MBA trains future professionals in sports management. 
About One Team 
One Team, Euroleague Basketball's corporate social responsibility (CSR) program, supported by Turkish Airlines as the One Team Founding Patron and with the collaboration of Special Olympics as Proud Partner, uses basketball to achieve real social impact in our communities. With an innovative model of interconnectedness across an entire continent, Euroleague Basketball and its clubs have developed a complete CSR program that brings together activities from each team in an integrated, impactful way, working under the theme of "community integration". Each participating club develops a specific One Team project tailored to its own community needs to benefit groups in danger of exclusion due to problems such as substance abuse and gender, physical or intellectual disability. Since its founding in 2012, the One Team program has reached already directly and indirectly more than 22,000 participants through its various team projects.

snippet.title: Emanet 140. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 140 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Emanet 139. B√∂l√ľm | Legacy Episode 139
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

#SehYam

snippet.title: Squishy Makeovers:  Easter Edition
snippet.description:
Welcome to another episode of squishy makeovers, where I transform ugly, used, old, dirty, cheap or unwanted squishies (donated by my subscribers) into my own creations. I repair, paint and cut away for hours on end to complete these. Hopefully you like them. Get used to lots of rainbow and sprinkles, because I am addicted to both!

PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

_________FAQs__________

1. CAN I SEND YOU SQUISHIES?
So many generous people have sent me their unwanted squishies so I actually have a lot to work on already, BUT if you desperately want to, you can request my mailing address in the email ALLLL the way at down in the description (sorry for the traveling), make sure to read the disclaimer down there as well.

2. ARE SQUISHIES RETURNED TO THE SENDERS AFTER THE MAKEOVER?
No. These squishies  are sent as donations to the series because they were damaged, and no longer wanted. Everyone has been informed in advance that squishies would not be returned. It would be waaay too complicated/expensive and massively time consuming to keep track of everyone and return each squishy. I'm just one person! 

3. WHAT PAINT DO YOU USE?
I use fabric paint. Fabric paint is meant to stretch, so it is perfect for squishing! Any brand will work fine, but I mainly use Tulip. You can find it at Michaels, Hobby Lobby, A.C. Moore, Walmart, Joann Fabrics, and Online.

5. WILL FABRIC PAINT CRACK?
The matte fabric paint is more likely to crack after lots of squishing. Slick fabric paints never crack. But there are benefits to both. I usually mix the two paints together to get the best of both worlds.

6. CAN I USE ACRYLIC PAINT ON SQUISHIES?
I would not recommend that. Acrylic paint will either make the squishy hard, or it will crack and flake off very easily. 



___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh ūüėā ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs

snippet.title: Emanet 139. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 139 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
